publishedAbstract: - The endpoints went missing for my glusterfs persistent volume claim pods went down.- PVC is deleted and recreated within a short period, the original PV and PVC will get deleted, with the new PVC and PV being provisioned, but the service and endpoints end up getting deleted and not recreated because they already exist at that point in time.
publishedTitle: Service and Endpoints missing for OpenShift GlusterFS dynamically created persistent volume claim.
